manifest_descr.message: Adds WebUSB capabilities to the browser
manifest_descr.description: The description in the manifest metadata

error_message.description: Button (browser action) tooltip if native process breaks

permission_hdr.message: A web page would like to access a USB device.
permission_hdr.description: First line (before device list) of the permission page

permission_p1.message: This lets the website talk with hardware plugged in to your computer. This goes beyond what websites are normally allowed to do. This can be very useful, but the browser cannot check everything the website or the USB device might do to your computer.

permission_p2.message: You should only allow this if you expect the website to be trying to access something “<abbr title="in real life">IRL</abbr>.”
